changes.value: ane-embedding/src/types.rs:73-74 uses serde_json in a test but serde_json is not declared as a dev-dependency in ane-embedding/Cargo.toml. This blocks all workspace tests from compiling. Fix: add serde_json as a dev-dependency to ane-embedding/Cargo.toml.
ane-embedding: missing serde_json dev-dependency causes test compilation failure

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-ane-embedding/src/types.rs:73-74 uses serde_json in a test but serde_json is not declared as a dev-dependency in ane-embedding/Cargo.toml. This blocks all workspace tests from compiling. Fix: add serde_json as a dev-dependency to ane-embedding/Cargo.toml.
\ No newline at end of file
+ane-embedding/src/types.rs:73-74 uses serde_json in a test but serde_json is not declared as a dev-dependency in ane-embedding/Cargo.toml. This blocks all workspace tests from compiling. Fix: add serde_json as a dev-dependency to ane-embedding/Cargo.toml. #test-failure
\ No newline at end of file
